purpose: Contract lifecycle management. Stores executed MSAs, SOWs, addenda, and order forms for all enterprise accounts.
csm_usage: CSMs access DocuSign to retrieve SLA terms, credit provisions, and renewal dates when handling escalations or renewal conversations. Access is read-only for CSMs.

Master_Service_Agreement.description: Top-level contract governing the relationship. Includes general terms, liability, IP.

SLA_Addendum.description: Service Level Agreement attached to MSA. Defines uptime guarantees, response times, and credit terms.

Order_Form.description: Governs the specific subscription: seats, modules, price, and renewal terms.

sample_contracts.special_provisions: Executive sponsor quarterly review required. 90-day written notice required to cancel auto-renewal.

sample_contracts.salesforce_account_id_note: Not populated in DocuSign — manual linkage missing

known_gaps.description: DocuSign is not integrated with Salesforce or Zendesk. Contract terms (SLA tier, response times, credit provisions) are not programmatically available in either system.
known_gaps.impact: CSMs manually look up contracts per escalation. Support agents cannot see contract terms when setting SLA clocks. Risk of non-compliance with contracted SLAs.

known_gaps.description: No automated renewal alert system between DocuSign and Salesforce. RenewalDate in Salesforce is manually maintained and may differ from the executed order form.
known_gaps.impact: Renewal conversations may start late. Auto-renewal accounts may renew without a CSM conversation, missing expansion opportunity.
